title: Experience Ores
description: A mod that adds an Exp Ore to every dimension.
body:
![ore in cave](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/tzmkkrWx/images/7ef04391b40b85448d2595dbab5652780c47fdda.png)
A mod that adds XP ores to every dimension.

When mined, every ore gives 7 experience points (not levels, points), but you can change this in the config file.

For reference, 7 XP points are the amount you need to get from level 0 to level 1, and gives enough mending to mine 14 blocks.

Happy Mining!

(Not like many other projects this one has a pretty high chance to get updated if there are enough people using it)

If you are experiencing issues, please contact me on Discord(@xyndranerd)
